_purpose: Universal ticket. Every message between any two parts of the system uses this shape.
_filled_by: Whoever is sending the ticket — orchestrator, agent, bot, Postman
_sent_to: n8n ticket intake webhook, or directly to a worker inbox

ticket_id._instruction: Leave blank. Auto-stamped by ticket intake system. Format: TKT-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX

project._instruction: Which project this ticket belongs to.

from._instruction: Who is sending this. Worker ID, bot name, or 'postman' for manual testing.

to._instruction: Who this is addressed to. Worker ID or 'orchestrator'.

action._instruction: What you are asking the recipient to do. Must match an action in their MANIFEST actions_handled list.

priority._instruction: How urgent. Normal flow: normal. Jump the queue: high. System issue: urgent.

ref_code._instruction: Optional. If this ticket relates to a specific registered document, put its ref code here.

payload._instruction: The actual data the recipient needs to do the job. Fields depend on the action. Check the recipient's MANIFEST for payload_required_by_action.

created_at._instruction: Leave blank. Auto-stamped by ticket intake.

status._instruction: Leave blank. Set by ticket system: NEW → RECEIVED → PROCESSING → COMPLETE / FAILED / NEEDS_INFO
